claim_boundary: Tier 5.19a is local software reference evidence only. It defines and tests a bounded temporal-substrate candidate against lag, reservoir, frozen/shuffled-state, no-recurrence, no-plasticity, and shuffled-target controls. It is not hardware evidence, not a baseline freeze, and not a promoted CRA mechanism by itself.

classification.recommendation: Proceed carefully: fading memory helps, but recurrence-specific value needs a sharper ablation in 5.19b.

fairness_contract.hardware_policy: software-only local reference; hardware blocked until promotion
no_future_leakage: task normalization uses chronological train prefix only
feature normalization uses train prefix only
shuffled controls shuffle within train/test splits
ESN readout fits train prefix only
fairness_contract.normalization: train-prefix z-score for tasks; train-prefix feature normalization for online readouts
fairness_contract.tier: Tier 5.19a - Local Continuous Temporal Substrate Reference
